title: Priest caste
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Priest}}
[[File:Vongpriest1.jpg|thumb|A Yuuzhan Vong priest]]
{{Quote|Taan Yun-forqana zhoi!|Battle cry of the priests|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Traitor">''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]''</ref>}}
The '''priest caste''' was one of the most powerful [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|castes]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] social structure.

==Overview==
The priests were those who were chosen to speak for the [[Yun'o|gods]], save for [[Yun-Yuuzhan]]. They also took the auguries to see if the gods would favor the [[Warrior caste|warriors]] in battle. As a caste, the priests had no specific deity to call their own, but were devoted to an individual deity for another caste. Members of the priest cast would often "[[Purification (Yuuzhan Vong)|purify]]" the Vong contaminated by technological items, an element forbidden in the Yuuzhan Vong society.

The priest caste was very important in the choosing of the [[Supreme Overlord]].

There was a different subgroup within this caste known as the [[Deception sect]] that consisted of followers of the 'Trickster' goddess [[Yun-Harla]] and were used as [[Spy/Legends|spies]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Another sect was the [[Order of Yun-Yuuzhan]]

==History==
{{Quote|Up until now your species have faced only Yuuzhan Vong warriors and politicians. As of today know that the true architects of your destiny have arrived.|[[Harrar]] to a [[H'kig]] priest|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>}}
The actions of the priest caste began in the initial stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] made their advances into the galaxy after the failure of the [[Praetorite Vong]] in gaining a foothold.
[[Harrar]] was involved in a plan at eliminating the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] by using the Priestess [[Elan]] as a means to deliver a bioweapon attack but this attempt failed.

As the war continued, this caste began noting an increase of problems in the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] as a number of their kind began to believe in the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]].

After the war's end, the remaining members of this caste left with their kin to the living planet of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].

*[[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]]
